svg.text: Federal accessibility compliance — what's required, and how MakerFlow meets it
ADA Title II (DOJ) + Section 504 (HHS) · WCAG 2.1 Level AA · 23 roadmap task cards mapped to obligations

g.text: Public universities · school districts · libraries · transit · special districts
Adds operational duties: ADA Coordinator (§35.107) · grievance procedure · effective communication (§35.160)
HHS grant recipients · academic medical centers · student health · Medicaid providers
ED Section 504 (34 CFR Part 104): parallel WCAG rule not yet finalized — OCR treats 2.1 AA as de facto bar
— success criteria most relevant to MakerFlow shown below
Operational obligations (Title II adds these beyond WCAG)
Equivalent provisions live in 45 CFR Part 84 Subpart C / Subpart I for Section 504 recipients.
For universities: most public R1 institutions are dual-covered (Title II + § 504) — they meet both deadlines and both program sets.
• Third-party content (not posted by/for the entity)
still requires alt-format provision on request.

svg.text: 4 · HOW MAKERFLOW ADDRESSES IT — 23 ROADMAP TASKS
Citations: 28 CFR § 35.200 · § 35.107 · § 35.160 · § 35.201 · 45 CFR § 84.84 · § 84.85 · W3C WCAG 2.1 AA · ITI VPAT 2.4 INT · 34 CFR Part 104 (ED · status pending).
